verses.latin_vulgate: Divisiones autem janitorum : de Coritis Meselemia, filius Core, de filiis Asaph.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לְמַחְלְק֖וֹת לְשֹׁעֲרִ֑ים לַקׇּרְחִ֕ים מְשֶׁלֶמְיָ֥הוּ בֶן־קֹרֵ֖א מִן־בְּנֵ֥י אָסָֽף׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the divisions of the porters: of the Corites Meselemia, the son of Core, of the sons of Asaph.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ovenvartiain järjestyksessä: Korhilaisista oli Meselemia, Koren poika, Asaphin lapsista.
verses.king_james: Concerning the divisions of the porters: Of the Korhites was Meshelemiah the son of Kore, of the sons of Asaph.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filii Meselemiæ : Zacharias primogenitus, Jadihel secundus, Zabadias tertius, Jathanaël quartus,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְלִמְשֶׁלֶמְיָ֖הוּ בָּנִ֑ים זְכַרְיָ֤הוּ הַבְּכוֹר֙ יְדִיעֲאֵ֣ל הַשֵּׁנִ֔י זְבַדְיָ֙הוּ֙ הַשְּׁלִישִׁ֔י יַתְנִיאֵ֖ל הָרְבִיעִֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: The sons of Meselemia: Zacharias the firstborn, Jadihel the second, Zabadias the third, Jathanael the fourth,
verses.finnish_biblia: Meselemian lapset olivat nämät: hänen esikoisensa Sakaria, toinen Jediael, kolmas Sebadia, neljäs Jatniel,
verses.king_james: And the sons of Meshelemiah were, Zechariah the firstborn, Jediael the second, Zebadiah the third, Jathniel the fourth,

verses.latin_vulgate: Ælam quintus, Johanan sextus, Elioënai septimus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עֵילָ֤ם הַחֲמִישִׁי֙ יְהוֹחָנָ֣ן הַשִּׁשִּׁ֔י אֶלְיְהוֹעֵינַ֖י הַשְּׁבִיעִֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: Elam the fifth, Johanan the sixth, Elioenai the seventh.
verses.finnish_biblia: Viides Elam, kuudes Johanan, seitsemäs Eljoenai.
verses.king_james: Elam the fifth, Jehohanan the sixth, Elioenai the seventh.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filii autem Obededom : Semeias primogenitus, Jozabad secundus, Joaha tertius, Sachar quartus, Nathanaël quintus,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּלְעֹבֵ֥ד אֱדֹ֖ם בָּנִ֑ים שְׁמַעְיָ֤ה הַבְּכוֹר֙ יְהוֹזָבָ֣ד הַשֵּׁנִ֔י יוֹאָ֤ח הַשְּׁלִשִׁי֙ וְשָׂכָ֣ר הָרְבִיעִ֔י וּנְתַנְאֵ֖ל הַחֲמִישִֽׁי׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the sons of Obededom, Semeias the firstborn, Jozabad the second, Joaha the third, Sachar the fourth, Nathanael the fifth,
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta Obededomin lapset olivat nämät: hänen esikoisensa Semaja, toinen Josabad, kolmas Joa, neljäs Sakar, viides Netaneel,
verses.king_james: Moreover the sons of Obed–edom were, Shemaiah the firstborn, Jehozabad the second, Joah the third, and Sacar the fourth, and Nethaneel the fifth,

verses.latin_vulgate: Ammiel sextus, Issachar septimus, Phollathi octavus : quia benedixit illi Dominus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עַמִּיאֵ֤ל הַשִּׁשִּׁי֙ יִשָּׂשכָ֣ר הַשְּׁבִיעִ֔י פְּעֻלְּתַ֖י הַשְּׁמִינִ֑י כִּ֥י בֵרְכ֖וֹ אֱלֹהִֽים׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: Ammiel the sixth, Issachar the seventh, Phollathi the eighth: for the Lord had blessed him.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kuudes Ammiel, seitsemäs Isaskar, kahdeksas Pegultai; sillä Jumala oli siunannut hänen.
verses.king_james: Ammiel the sixth, Issachar the seventh, Peulthai the eighth: for God blessed him.

verses.latin_vulgate: Semei autem filio ejus nati sunt filii, præfecti familiarum suarum : erant enim viri fortissimi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְלִֽשְׁמַעְיָ֤ה בְנוֹ֙ נוֹלַ֣ד בָּנִ֔ים הַמִּמְשָׁלִ֖ים לְבֵ֣ית אֲבִיהֶ֑ם כִּֽי־גִבּ֥וֹרֵי חַ֖יִל הֵֽמָּה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And to Semei his son were born sons, heads of their families: for they were men of great valour.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hänen poikansa Semaja siitti myös poikia, jotka isänsä huoneessa hallitsivat; sillä he olivat väkevät sankarit.
verses.king_james: Also unto Shemaiah his son were sons born, that ruled throughout the house of their father: for they were mighty men of valour.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filii ergo Semeiæ : Othni, et Raphaël, et Obed, Elzabad, fratres ejus viri fortissimi : Eliu quoque et Samachias.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּנֵ֣י שְׁמַֽעְיָ֗ה עׇ֠תְנִ֠י וּרְפָאֵ֨ל וְעוֹבֵ֧ד אֶלְזָבָ֛ד אֶחָ֖יו בְּנֵי־חָ֑יִל אֱלִיה֖וּ וּסְמַכְיָֽהוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: The sons then of Semeias were Othni, and Raphael, and Obed, Elizabad, and his brethren most valiant men: and Eliu, and Samachias.
verses.finnish_biblia: Semajan lapset: Otni, Rephael, Obed ja Elsabad, jonka veljet olivat väkevät miehet, Elihu ja Semakia.
verses.king_james: The sons of Shemaiah; Othni, and Rephael, and Obed, Elzabad, whose brethren were strong men, Elihu, and Semachiah.

verses.latin_vulgate: Omnes hi, de filiis Obededom : ipsi, et filii et fratres eorum, fortissimi ad ministrandum, sexaginta duo de Obededom.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כׇּל־אֵ֜לֶּה מִבְּנֵ֣י ׀ עֹבֵ֣ד אֱדֹ֗ם הֵ֤מָּה וּבְנֵיהֶם֙ וַאֲחֵיהֶ֔ם אִֽישׁ־חַ֥יִל בַּכֹּ֖חַ לַעֲבֹדָ֑ה שִׁשִּׁ֥ים וּשְׁנַ֖יִם לְעֹבֵ֥ד אֱדֹֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: All these of the sons of Obededom: they, and their sons, and their brethren most able men for service, sixty-two of Obededom.
verses.finnish_biblia: Nämät kaikki olivat Obededomin lapset, he ja heidän lapsensa ja veljensä olivat väkevät miehet virassa: kaksiseitsemättäkymmentä Obededomista.
verses.king_james: All these of the sons of Obed–edom: they and their sons and their brethren, able men for strength for the service, were threescore and two of Obed–edom.

verses.latin_vulgate: Porro Meselemiæ filii, et fratres eorum robustissimi, decem et octo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְלִמְשֶׁלֶמְיָ֗הוּ בָּנִ֧ים וְאַחִ֛ים בְּנֵי־חָ֖יִל שְׁמוֹנָ֥ה עָשָֽׂר׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: And the sons of Meselemia, and their brethren strong men, were eighteen.
verses.finnish_biblia: Meselemialla oli lapsia ja veljiä, väkeviä miehiä kahdeksantoistakymmentä.
verses.king_james: And Meshelemiah had sons and brethren, strong men, eighteen.

verses.latin_vulgate: De Hosa autem, id est, de filiis Merari : Semri princeps (non enim habuerat primogenitum, et idcirco posuerat eum pater ejus in principem),
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּלְחֹסָ֥ה מִן־בְּנֵי־מְרָרִ֖י בָּנִ֑ים שִׁמְרִ֤י הָרֹאשׁ֙ כִּ֣י לֹֽא־הָיָ֣ה בְכ֔וֹר וַיְשִׂימֵ֥הוּ אָבִ֖יהוּ לְרֹֽאשׁ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And of Hosa, that is, of the sons of Merari: Semri the chief, (for he had not a firstborn, and therefore his father made him chief.)
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta Hosalla Merarin lapsista oli poikia: kaikkein jaloin oli Simri, vaikka ei hän ollut esikoinen, kuitenkin asetti hänen isänsä hänen päämieheksi;
verses.king_james: Also Hosah, of the children of Merari, had sons; Simri the chief, (for though he was not the firstborn, yet his father made him the chief;)

verses.latin_vulgate: Helcias secundus, Tabelias tertius, Zacharias quartus : omnes hi filii et fratres Hosa, tredecim.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: חִלְקִיָּ֤הוּ הַשֵּׁנִי֙ טְבַלְיָ֣הוּ הַשְּׁלִשִׁ֔י זְכַרְיָ֖הוּ הָרְבִעִ֑י כׇּל־בָּנִ֧ים וְאַחִ֛ים לְחֹסָ֖ה שְׁלֹשָׁ֥ה עָשָֽׂר׃
verses.douay_rheims: Helcias the second, Tabelias the third, Zacharias the fourth: all these the sons, and the brethren of Hosa, were thirteen.
verses.finnish_biblia: Toinen Hilkia, kolmas Tebalia, neljäs Sakaria: kaikki Hosan lapset ja veljet kolmetoistakymmentä.
verses.king_james: Hilkiah the second, Tebaliah the third, Zechariah the fourth: all the sons and brethren of Hosah were thirteen.

verses.latin_vulgate: Hi divisi sunt in janitores, ut semper principes custodiarum, sicut et fratres eorum ministrarent in domo Domini.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לְ֠אֵ֠לֶּה מַחְלְק֨וֹת הַשֹּׁעֲרִ֜ים לְרָאשֵׁ֧י הַגְּבָרִ֛ים מִשְׁמָר֖וֹת לְעֻמַּ֣ת אֲחֵיהֶ֑ם לְשָׁרֵ֖ת בְּבֵ֥ית יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: Among these were the divisions of the porters, so that the chiefs of the wards, as well as their brethren, always ministered in the house of the Lord.
verses.finnish_biblia: Tämä on ovenvartiain järjestys väkeväin päämiesten seassa, vartioissa heidän veljeinsä kohdalla, palvelemaan Herran huoneessa.
verses.king_james: Among these were the divisions of the porters, even among the chief men, having wards one against another, to minister in the house of the Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: Missæ sunt ergo sortes ex æquo, et parvis et magnis, per familias suas in unamquamque portarum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּפִּ֨ילוּ גוֹרָל֜וֹת כַּקָּטֹ֧ן כַּגָּד֛וֹל לְבֵ֥ית אֲבוֹתָ֖ם לְשַׁ֥עַר וָשָֽׁעַר׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: And they cast lots equally, both little and great, by their families for every one of the gates.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja arpa oli heitetty pienten niinkuin suurtenkin välillä, heidän isäinsä huoneessa, jokaisen portin eteen.
verses.king_james: And they cast lots, as well the small as the great, according to the house of their fathers, for every gate.

verses.latin_vulgate: Cecidit ergo sors orientalis, Selemiæ. Porro Zachariæ filio ejus, viro prudentissimo et erudito, sortito obtigit plaga septentrionalis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּפֹּ֧ל הַגּוֹרָ֛ל מִזְרָ֖חָה לְשֶׁלֶמְיָ֑הוּ וּזְכַרְיָ֨הוּ בְנ֜וֹ יוֹעֵ֣ץ ׀ בְּשֶׂ֗כֶל הִפִּ֙ילוּ֙ גּֽוֹרָל֔וֹת וַיֵּצֵ֥א גוֹרָל֖וֹ צָפֽוֹנָה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the lot of the east fell to Selemias. But to his son Zacharias, a very wise and learned man, the north gate fell by lot.
verses.finnish_biblia: Arpa itään päin lankesi Selemian päälle; mutta hänen poikansa Sakaria, joka toimellinen neuvossa oli, heitti arvan, ja hänen arpansa lankesi pohjaan päin;
verses.king_james: And the lot eastward fell to Shelemiah. Then for Zechariah his son, a wise counsellor, they cast lots; and his lot came out northward.

verses.latin_vulgate: Obededom vero et filiis ejus ad austrum : in qua parte domus erat seniorum concilium.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לְעֹבֵ֥ד אֱדֹ֖ם נֶ֑גְבָּה וּלְבָנָ֖יו בֵּ֥ית הָאֲסֻפִּֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: And to Obededom and his sons that towards the south: in which part of the house was the council of the ancients.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta Obededomin etelään päin, ja hänen poikainsa Asuppimin huoneen tykö.
verses.king_james: To Obed–edom southward; and to his sons the house of Asuppim.

verses.latin_vulgate: Sephim et Hosa ad occidentem, juxta portam, quæ ducit ad viam ascensionis : custodia contra custodiam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לְשֻׁפִּ֤ים וּלְחֹסָה֙ לַֽמַּעֲרָ֔ב עִ֚ם שַׁ֣עַר שַׁלֶּ֔כֶת בַּֽמְסִלָּ֖ה הָעוֹלָ֑ה מִשְׁמָ֖ר לְעֻמַּ֥ת מִשְׁמָֽר׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: To Sephim, and Hosa towards the west, by the gate which leadeth to the way of the ascent: ward against ward.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Suppim ja Hosa saivat lännen puolelle, Salleketin portille, josta korkian ahteen päälle mennään, jossa vartiat seisovat toinen toistansa vastaan.
verses.king_james: To Shuppim and Hosah the lot came forth westward, with the gate Shallecheth, by the causeway of the going up, ward against ward.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ad orientem vero Levitæ sex : et ad aquilonem, quatuor per diem : atque ad meridiem similiter in die quatuor : et ubi erat concilium bini et bini.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לַמִּזְרָח֮ הַלְוִיִּ֣ם שִׁשָּׁה֒ לַצָּפ֤וֹנָה לַיּוֹם֙ אַרְבָּעָ֔ה לַנֶּ֥גְבָּה לַיּ֖וֹם אַרְבָּעָ֑ה {ס} וְלָאֲסֻפִּ֖ים שְׁנַ֥יִם שְׁנָֽיִם׃
verses.douay_rheims: Now towards the east were six Levites: and towards the north four a day: and towards the south likewise four a day: and where the council was, two and two.
verses.finnish_biblia: Itään päin oli kuusi Leviläistä, pohjaan päin neljä joka päivä, etelään päin neljä joka päivä, mutta Asuppimin tykönä kaksi ja kaksi;
verses.king_james: Eastward were six Levites, northward four a day, southward four a day, and toward Asuppim two and two.

verses.latin_vulgate: In cellulis quoque janitorum ad occidentem quatuor in via, binique per cellulas.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לַפַּרְבָּ֖ר לַֽמַּעֲרָ֑ב אַרְבָּעָה֙ לַֽמְסִלָּ֔ה שְׁנַ֖יִם לַפַּרְבָּֽר׃
verses.douay_rheims: In the cells also of the porters toward the west four in the way: and two at every cell.
verses.finnish_biblia: Parbarin tykönä länteen päin neljä joka haarassa, ja kahdet Parbarin tykönä.
verses.king_james: At Parbar westward, four at the causeway, and two at Parbar.

verses.latin_vulgate: Hæ sunt divisiones janitorum filiorum Core et Merari.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֵ֗לֶּה מַחְלְקוֹת֙ הַשֹּׁ֣עֲרִ֔ים לִבְנֵ֥י הַקׇּרְחִ֖י וְלִבְנֵ֥י מְרָרִֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: These are the divisions of the porters of the sons of Core, and of Merari.
verses.finnish_biblia: Tämä on ovenvartiain järjestys, Korhilaisten ja Merarin lasten seassa.
verses.king_james: These are the divisions of the porters among the sons of Kore, and among the sons of Merari.

verses.latin_vulgate: Porro Achias erat super thesauros domus Dei, et vasa sanctorum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְֽהַלְוִיִּ֑ם אֲחִיָּ֗ה עַל־אֽוֹצְרוֹת֙ בֵּ֣ית הָאֱלֹהִ֔ים וּלְאֹצְר֖וֹת הַקֳּדָשִֽׁים׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: Now Achias was over the treasures of the house of God, and the holy vessels.
verses.finnish_biblia: Leviläisistä oli Ahia Jumalan huoneen tavarain päällä ja pyhyyden tavarain päällä;
verses.king_james: And of the Levites, Ahijah was over the treasures of the house of God, and over the treasures of the dedicated things.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filii Ledan, filii Gersonni : de Ledan principes familiarum Ledan, et Gersonni, Jehieli.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּנֵ֣י לַ֠עְדָּ֠ן בְּנֵ֨י הַגֵּרְשֻׁנִּ֜י לְלַעְדָּ֗ן רָאשֵׁ֧י הָאָב֛וֹת לְלַעְדָּ֥ן הַגֵּרְשֻׁנִּ֖י יְחִיאֵלִֽי׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: The sons of Ledan, the sons of Gersonni: of Ledan were heads of the families, of Ledan, and Gersonni, Jehieli.
verses.finnish_biblia: Laedanin lapset, Gersonin lapset Laedanista: Laedanin Gersonilaisen, isäin päämiehet Jehieliläiset;
verses.king_james: As concerning the sons of Laadan; the sons of the Gershonite Laadan, chief fathers, even of Laadan the Gershonite, were Jehieli.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filii Jehieli : Zathan, et Joël fratres ejus super thesauros domus Domini.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּנֵ֖י יְחִיאֵלִ֑י זֵתָם֙ וְיוֹאֵ֣ל אָחִ֔יו עַל־אֹצְר֖וֹת בֵּ֥ית יְהֹוָֽה׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: The sons of Jehieli: Zathan and Joel, his brethren over the treasures of the house of the Lord,
verses.finnish_biblia: Jehieliläisten lapset: Setam ja hänen veljensä Joel, Herran huoneen tavarain päällä;
verses.king_james: The sons of Jehieli; Zetham, and Joel his brother, which were over the treasures of the house of the Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: Amramitis, et Isaaritis, et Hebronitis, et Ozihelitis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לַֽעַמְרָמִי֙ לַיִּצְהָרִ֔י לַחֶבְרוֹנִ֖י לָעׇזִּיאֵלִֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: With the Amramites, and Isaarites, and Hebronites, and Ozielites.
verses.finnish_biblia: Amramilaisista, Jitseharilaisista, Hebronilaisista ja Ussielilaisista
verses.king_james: Of the Amramites, and the Izharites, the Hebronites, and the Uzzielites:

verses.latin_vulgate: Subaël autem filius Gersom filii Moysi, præpositus thesauris.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּשְׁבֻאֵל֙ בֶּן־גֵּרְשׁ֣וֹם בֶּן־מֹשֶׁ֔ה נָגִ֖יד עַל־הָאֹצָרֽוֹת׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: And Subael the son of Gersom, the son of Moses, was chief over the treasures.
verses.finnish_biblia: Oli Sebuel Gersomin poika, Moseksen pojan poika, päämies tavarain päällä.
verses.king_james: And Shebuel the son of Gershom, the son of Moses, was ruler of the treasures.

verses.latin_vulgate: Fratres quoque ejus Eliezer, cujus filius Rahabia, et hujus filius Isaias, et hujus filius Joram, hujus quoque filius Zechri, et hujus filius Selemith.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאֶחָ֖יו לֶאֱלִיעֶ֑זֶר רְחַבְיָ֨הוּ בְנ֜וֹ וִישַׁעְיָ֤הֽוּ בְנוֹ֙ וְיֹרָ֣ם בְּנ֔וֹ וְזִכְרִ֥י בְנ֖וֹ (ושלמות) [וּשְׁלֹמִ֥ית] בְּנֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: His brethren also, Eliezer, whose son Rohobia, and his son Isaias, and his son Joram, and his son Zechri, and his son Selemith.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta hänen veljellänsä Elieserillä oli poika Rehabia, ja hänen poikansa Jesaja, hänen poikansa Joram, hänen poikansa Sikri, ja hänen poikansa Selomit.
verses.king_james: And his brethren by Eliezer; Rehabiah his son, and Jeshaiah his son, and Joram his son, and Zichri his son, and Shelomith his son.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ipse Selemith, et fratres ejus, super thesauros sanctorum quæ sanctificavit David rex, et principes familiarum, et tribuni, et centuriones, et duces exercitus,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: ה֧וּא שְׁלֹמ֣וֹת וְאֶחָ֗יו עַ֣ל כׇּל־אֹצְר֤וֹת הַקֳּדָשִׁים֙ אֲשֶׁ֨ר הִקְדִּ֜ישׁ דָּוִ֣יד הַמֶּ֗לֶךְ וְרָאשֵׁ֧י הָאָב֛וֹת לְשָׂרֵֽי־הָאֲלָפִ֥ים וְהַמֵּא֖וֹת וְשָׂרֵ֥י הַצָּבָֽא׃
verses.douay_rheims: Which Selemith and his brethren were over the treasures of the holy things, which king David, and the heads of families, and the captains over thousands and over hundreds, and the captains of the host had dedicated,
verses.finnish_biblia: Selomit ja hänen veljensä olivat kaikkein pyhäin tavarain päällä, jotka David kuningas oli pyhittänyt, ja ylimmäiset isät, tuhanten ja satain päämiehet sotajoukon päällä.
verses.king_james: Which Shelomith and his brethren were over all the treasures of the dedicated things, which David the king, and the chief fathers, the captains over thousands and hundreds, and the captains of the host, had dedicated.

verses.latin_vulgate: de bellis et manubiis præliorum, quæ consecraverant ad instaurationem et supellectilem templi Domini.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מִן־הַמִּלְחָמ֥וֹת וּמִן־הַשָּׁלָ֖ל הִקְדִּ֑ישׁוּ לְחַזֵּ֖ק לְבֵ֥ית יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: Out of the wars, and the spoils won in battles, which they had consecrated to the building and furniture of the temple of the Lord.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sodasta ja saaliista ovat he pyhittäneet Herran huoneen parannukseksi;
verses.king_james: Out of the spoils won in battles did they dedicate to maintain the house of the Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: Hæc autem universa sanctificavit Samuel videns, et Saul filius Cis, et Abner filius Ner, et Joab filius Sarviæ : omnes qui sanctificaverant ea per manum Selemith et fratrum ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְכֹ֨ל הַהִקְדִּ֜ישׁ שְׁמוּאֵ֤ל הָרֹאֶה֙ וְשָׁא֣וּל בֶּן־קִ֔ישׁ וְאַבְנֵ֣ר בֶּן־נֵ֔ר וְיוֹאָ֖ב בֶּן־צְרוּיָ֑ה כֹּ֚ל הַמַּקְדִּ֔ישׁ עַ֥ל יַד־שְׁלֹמִ֖ית וְאֶחָֽיו׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: And all these things that Samuel the seer and Saul the son of Cis, and Abner the son of Ner, and Joab the son of Sarvia had sanctified: and whosoever had sanctified those things, they were under the hand of Selemith and his brethren.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kaikki myös mitä näkiä Samuel, ja Saul Kisin poika, ja Abner Nerin poika, ja Joab Zerujan poika olivat pyhittäneet, ja kaikki mitkä pyhitetyt olivat, olivat Selomitin ja hänen veljeinsä käden alla.
verses.king_james: And all that Samuel the seer, and Saul the son of Kish, and Abner the son of Ner, and Joab the son of Zeruiah, had dedicated; and whosoever had dedicated any thing, it was under the hand of Shelomith, and of his brethren.

verses.latin_vulgate: Isaaritis vero præerat Chonenias, et filii ejus ad opera forinsecus super Israël ad docendum et judicandum eos.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לַיִּצְהָרִ֞י כְּנַנְיָ֣הוּ וּבָנָ֗יו לַמְּלָאכָ֤ה הַחִֽיצוֹנָה֙ עַל־יִשְׂרָאֵ֔ל לְשֹׁטְרִ֖ים וּלְשֹׁפְטִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: But Chonenias and his sons were over the Isaarites, for the business abroad over Israel to teach them and judge them.
verses.finnish_biblia: Jitseharilaisista olivat Kenania poikinensa asetetut ulkonaisen työn haltiaksi ja tuomariksi Israelissa;
verses.king_james: Of the Izharites, Chenaniah and his sons were for the outward business over Israel, for officers and judges.

verses.latin_vulgate: Porro de Hebronitis Hasabias, et fratres ejus viri fortissimi, mille septingenti præerant Israëli trans Jordanem contra occidentem, in cunctis operibus Domini, et in ministerium regis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לַחֶבְרוֹנִ֡י חֲשַׁבְיָ֩הוּ֩ וְאֶחָ֨יו בְּנֵי־חַ֜יִל אֶ֣לֶף וּשְׁבַע־מֵא֗וֹת עַ֚ל פְּקֻדַּ֣ת יִשְׂרָאֵ֔ל מֵעֵ֥בֶר לַיַּרְדֵּ֖ן מַעְרָ֑בָה לְכֹל֙ מְלֶ֣אכֶת יְהֹוָ֔ה וְלַעֲבֹדַ֖ת הַמֶּֽלֶךְ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And of the Hebronites Hasabias, and his brethren most able men, a thousand seven hundred had the charge over Israel beyond the Jordan westward, in all the works of the Lord, and for the service of the king.
verses.finnish_biblia: Hebronilaisia Hasabia ja hänen veljensä, väkevät miehet, tuhannen ja seitsemänsataa, asetetut virkaan Israelissa, tuolla puolella Jordania länteen päin, kaikkinaisiin Herran asioihin ja kuninkaan palvelukseen.
verses.king_james: And of the Hebronites, Hashabiah and his brethren, men of valour, a thousand and seven hundred, were officers among them of Israel on this side Jordan westward in all the business of the Lord, and in the service of the king.

verses.latin_vulgate: Hebronitarum autem princeps fuit Jeria secundum familias et cognationes eorum. Quadragesimo anno regni David recensiti sunt, et inventi sunt viri fortissimi in Jazer Galaad,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לַֽחֶבְרוֹנִי֙ יְרִיָּ֣ה הָרֹ֔אשׁ לַֽחֶבְרוֹנִ֥י לְתֹלְדֹתָ֖יו לְאָב֑וֹת בִּשְׁנַ֨ת הָאַרְבָּעִ֜ים לְמַלְכ֤וּת דָּוִיד֙ נִדְרָ֔שׁוּ וַיִּמָּצֵ֥א בָהֶ֛ם גִּבּ֥וֹרֵי חַ֖יִל בְּיַעְזֵ֥יר גִּלְעָֽד׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the chief of the Hebronites was Jeria according to their families and kindreds. In the fortieth year of the reign of David they were numbered, and there were found most valiant men in Jazer Galaad,
verses.finnish_biblia: Hebronilaisia oli myös Jerijah, Hebronilaisten päämies, heidän sukukuntainsa ja isäinsä seassa. Ja neljäntenäkymmenentenä kuningas Davidin valtakunnan vuonna etsittiin ja löydettiin heidän seassansa väkevät miehet Gileadin Jaeserissa.
verses.king_james: Among the Hebronites was Jerijah the chief, even among the Hebronites, according to the generations of his fathers. In the fortieth year of the reign of David they were sought for, and there were found among them mighty men of valour at Jazer of Gilead.

verses.latin_vulgate: fratresque ejus robustioris ætatis, duo millia septingenti principes familiarum. Præposuit autem eos David rex Rubenitis, et Gadditis, et dimidiæ tribui Manasse, in omne ministerium Dei et regis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאֶחָ֣יו בְּנֵי־חַ֗יִל אַלְפַּ֛יִם וּשְׁבַ֥ע מֵא֖וֹת רָאשֵׁ֣י הָאָב֑וֹת וַֽיַּפְקִידֵ֞ם דָּוִ֣יד הַמֶּ֗לֶךְ עַל־הָראוּבֵנִ֤י וְהַגָּדִי֙ וַחֲצִי֙ שֵׁ֣בֶט הַֽמְנַשִּׁ֔י לְכׇל־דְּבַ֥ר הָאֱלֹהִ֖ים וּדְבַ֥ר הַמֶּֽלֶךְ׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: And his brethren of stronger age, two thousand seven hundred chiefs of families. And king David made them rulers over the Rubenites and the Gadites, and the half tribe of Manasses, for all the service of God, and the king.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hänen veljensä olivat väkevät miehet, kaksituhatta ja seitsemänsataa isäin päämiehiä. Ja David kuningas asetti heitä Rubenilaisten, Gadilaisten ja puolen Manassen sukukunnan päälle, kaikkiin Jumalan ja kuninkaan asioihin.
verses.king_james: And his brethren, men of valour, were two thousand and seven hundred chief fathers, whom king David made rulers over the Reubenites, the Gadites, and the half tribe of Manasseh, for every matter pertaining to God, and affairs of the king.
